authority: This file is the single source of truth for numbers (GR-1). No metric appears in prose except as a citation of this file. Keystone-only writes.

objective.gate: held-out comprehension 8/8, questions drawn by the Gap from the original guide
objective.hardConstraint: compressed guide stays a self-contained instruction document

baseline.how: tr -s '[:space:]' '\n' < artifact/GUIDE.md | grep -c .  (whitespace-split tokens of the full markdown file)

openTarget.statement: first validated compression below 730 words at gate 8/8
